scripts.setup:env: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const dest=path.join('packages','mcp-server','.env');if(!fs.existsSync(dest)){fs.copyFileSync(path.join('packages','mcp-server','.env.example'),dest);console.log('Created '+dest+' from .env.example. Fill in your Supabase credentials before running dev:mcp.');}"
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && npm run dev -w @body-io/web
scripts.dev:mcp: npm run setup:env && npm run build:shared && npm run dev -w @body-io/mcp-server
scripts.prebuild: npm run build:shared && npm run build:mcp-server
scripts.pretypecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run build:mcp-server
scripts.test: npm run build:shared && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:web: npm run build:shared && npm run test -w @body-io/web
scripts.test:mcp: npm run build:shared && npm run test -w @body-io/mcp-server
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build:shared && npm run test:coverage -w @body-io/shared && npm run test:coverage -w @body-io/web && npm run test:coverage -w @body-io/mcp-server
